info.name: Zentra API v1
info.description:
Zentra Backend API collection generated from src/app.js and route handlers.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}}

Switch environment (either way):
1. Set `env` to `development` or `production` — baseUrl syncs automatically when env changes.
2. Or manually set `baseUrl` Current Value — it will not be overwritten until you change `env`.

Presets:
- development: http://localhost:3000
- production: https://backend.zentra.lol

Authentication:
- Health is public.
- Map, prediction, and recommendation endpoints send Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}.
- Set `clerkSessionToken` to a Clerk session token from an authenticated client session before calling protected endpoints.

Active endpoints (this collection):
- GET /api/v1/health
- GET /api/v1/map/heatmap
- POST /api/v1/predictions
- POST /api/v1/predictions/batch
- GET /api/v1/predictions/forecast
- POST /api/v1/predictions/explanation
- POST /api/v1/recommendations
- POST /api/v1/recommendations/quiet-times
- POST /api/v1/recommendations/places

Response envelope:
- Success: { success: true, data, meta: { generatedAt, ... } }
- Error: { success: false, error: { code, message }, meta: { generatedAt, ... } }

Shared test variables: clerkSessionToken, lat, lng, targetTime, startTime, endTime

variable.description: Active base URL. Auto-synced when env changes; manual edits are preserved.
Clerk session token used as Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}} for protected endpoints.

request.description:
Check API and database connectivity.

Success (200): data.status='ok', data.apiVersion='v1', data.database='connected', data.uptimeSeconds
Error (503): error.code='DATABASE_UNAVAILABLE'

query.description: ISO 8601 date-time. Optional, default current time.
Data source: auto, ml, or database. Default auto.

request.description:
Get crowd heatmap points.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Query params:
- targetTime (Optional): ISO 8601 date-time, default current time
- limit (Optional): default 100, max 524
- source (Optional): auto | ml | database, default auto

Success (200): data.targetTime, data.source ('ml_fastapi' | 'h3_grid_scores'), data.points[]
Each point: h3Cell, coordinates, period, queryTimestamp, crowdScore, crowdLevel, pedestriansPredicted, source; ML points may include crowdCategory; database points may include poiTotal
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY' (invalid targetTime)
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (503): error.code='ML_API_UNAVAILABLE' (when source=ml and ML fails)
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'

Get crowd prediction for a coordinate.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required body: lat (number), lng (number), targetTime (date-time string)
Optional: durationMinutes (default 60, range 15-240)

Manhattan bounds: lat 40.679-40.882, lng -74.020 to -73.907

Success (200): data.prediction with predictionId, h3Cell, coordinates, matchedCoordinates, targetTime, durationMinutes, busynessScore, busynessLevel, pedestriansPredicted, period, confidence, modelVersion, cached, source (and crowdCategory when ML is used; features when database fallback is used)
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (422): error.code='LOCATION_OUT_OF_COVERAGE' or 'INVALID_QUERY' (durationMinutes)
Error (503): error.code='PREDICTION_UNAVAILABLE'
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'

Get predictions for multiple coordinates.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required body: coordinates (array, 1-100 items with lat/lng, optional clientId), targetTime
Optional: durationMinutes (default 60, range 15-240)
Legacy aliases: locations (instead of coordinates), locationId (instead of clientId)

Success (200): data.targetTime, data.durationMinutes, data.predictions[], data.warnings[]
Per-item failures appear in warnings with codes: INVALID_COORDINATES, LOCATION_OUT_OF_COVERAGE, PREDICTION_UNAVAILABLE, INTERNAL_ERROR
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (422): error.code='INVALID_QUERY' (durationMinutes)

query.description: Max forecast points. Optional, default 24, max 100.

request.description:
Get crowd forecast for one coordinate over a time range.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required query: lat, lng, startTime, endTime
Optional: limit (default 24, max 100)

Success (200): data.h3Cell, data.coordinates, data.startTime, data.endTime, data.forecast[] (each with timestamp, period, busynessScore, busynessLevel, pedestriansPredicted)
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (503): error.code='PREDICTION_UNAVAILABLE'
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'

Get human-readable explanation for a predicted crowd score.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required body: lat (number), lng (number), targetTime (date-time string), busynessScore (number 0-100)
Optional: period (string, e.g. AM, PM)

Manhattan bounds: lat 40.679-40.882, lng -74.020 to -73.907

Success (200): data.explanation with summary, reasons[], suggestedAction, disclaimer
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (422): error.code='LOCATION_OUT_OF_COVERAGE' or 'INVALID_QUERY' (busynessScore out of range)
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'

Get quieter nearby area recommendations.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required body: lat, lng, targetTime
Optional: limit (default 5, max 20)

Success (200): data.targetTime, data.recommendations[] with type='quieter_area', h3Cell, coordinates, busynessScore, busynessLevel, pedestriansPredicted, period, reason
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'

Find quieter alternative times for a location within a time window.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required body: lat, lng, targetTime, startTime, endTime
Optional: limit (default 3, max 24)

Manhattan bounds: lat 40.679-40.882, lng -74.020 to -73.907

Success (200): data.original (targetTime, busynessScore, busynessLevel), data.quietTimes[] (targetTime, busynessScore, busynessLevel, confidence, reason)
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (422): error.code='LOCATION_OUT_OF_COVERAGE'
Error (503): error.code='PREDICTION_UNAVAILABLE'
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'

Rank frontend-provided candidate places by predicted crowd score and distance.

Authentication: requires Authorization: Bearer {{clerkSessionToken}}

Required body: targetTime, candidatePlaces (array, 1-100 items; each needs valid coordinates.lat/lng)
Optional: currentLocation (lat/lng for distance sorting), limit (default 5, max 20)
Each candidate may include placeId or poiId, name, category, coordinates, source

Success (200): data.targetTime, data.recommendations[] (type='candidate_place', place, prediction, distanceMeters, rank, reason), data.warnings[]
Warning codes: INVALID_COORDINATES, LOCATION_OUT_OF_COVERAGE, PREDICTION_UNAVAILABLE, INTERNAL_ERROR
Error (400): error.code='INVALID_QUERY'
Error (401): error.code='UNAUTHORIZED'
Error (422): error.code='LOCATION_OUT_OF_COVERAGE' (invalid currentLocation)
Error (500): error.code='INTERNAL_ERROR'
